summary: A Fox News broadcast clip of President Trump delivering his State of the Union address from the House rostrum, with Vice President Vance and Speaker Johnson seated behind him and cutaways to the audience (including Kristi Noem and Pete Hegseth applauding) touting record border security. It is a raw televised speech with a news chyron and no music or stylized editing. Out of scope as a plain news/speech clip.
notable_text: FOX NEWS; STATE OF THE UNION ADDRESS
